description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named Testsuites that runs in the default stage using the default Docker image. In before_script install build tools with "apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq autopoint autoconf automake gettext libncurses5-dev dejagnu". In script execute "./autogen.sh", then "./configure", then "make", and finally "make check". After the script run "make clean" as after_script. Archive any files matching "testsuite/*.log" and "testsuite/*.sum" as job artifacts. Configure the job to be excluded from tag pipelines (except tags) and do not set any specific runner tags or variables.
